description: guard: SessionStart preflight (managed runtime and safe-chain diagnostics) plus PreToolUse enforcement (package installs must pass the safe-chain scan).

hooks.command: sh -c 'PY="${JIG_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/jig}/bin/python3"; if [ -x "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "$1" preflight; fi; printf %s "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"guard inactive: managed Python runtime missing. Tell the user to run scripts/setup.sh from the guard plugin directory.\"}}"' jig-guard "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/guard.py"
sh -c 'PY="${JIG_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share/jig}/bin/python3"; if [ -x "$PY" ]; then exec "$PY" "$1"; fi' jig-guard "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/guard.py"
